_comment: Expected Cursor output for canonical/degradation-input-rewrite.json. Cursor does not support input_rewrite. The default degradation strategy is 'block', so the converted hook MUST always block (exit code 2). before_tool_execute + shell maps to beforeShellExecution on Cursor.
_warnings: Hook 1: input_rewrite capability not supported by Cursor — degradation strategy 'block' applied. The converted hook blocks all matching actions unconditionally.
Hook 1: structured_output degraded — Cursor supports limited output fields (permission, userMessage, agentMessage) but not updated_input

beforeShellExecution.command: echo 'BLOCKED: input_rewrite capability required but not supported by this provider. The hook ./sanitize-input.sh sanitizes tool input, which cannot be applied without input_rewrite support.' >&2; exit 2
